scripts.lint: biome check index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json README.md tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills scripts --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write index.ts api.ts openclaw.plugin.json package.json README.md tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json src skills scripts --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.pack:smoke: rm -rf .pack && mkdir -p .pack && pnpm pack --pack-destination .pack && tar -tf .pack/*.tgz | grep -E 'package/(index.ts|api.ts|openclaw.plugin.json|README.md|scripts/git-create-branch.sh|scripts/git-create-commit.sh|src/index.ts|src/git-workflow-tool.ts|src/runtime/plan-groups.ts|src/runtime/validate-confirmed-plan.ts|src/types/openclaw-plugin-sdk.d.ts|skills/openclaw-git-workflow/SKILL.md)$'
